name: Ben & Jerry's Giant Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Beat butter and both sugars in a large mixing bowl until light and fluffy. Add egg and vanilla extract and mix well.
3. Mix flour, salt, and baking soda in another bowl. Add dry ingredients to the batter and mix until well blended. Stir in chocolate chips and walnuts.
4. Drop dough by small scoops 2 to 3 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet. Flatten each scoop with the back of a spoon to about 3 inches in diameter.
5. Bake until centers are still slightly soft to the touch, 11 to 14 minutes. Let cool on cookie sheet for 5 minutes, then transfer to racks to cool completely.
Makes 12 to 15 cookies, or 1 for Randall!
